query: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.sort_title, b.description, b.language, b.publication_date, b.publisher_id, b.added_at, b.updated_at, b.rating, b.page_count, b.metadata_status, b.metadata_confidence, b.cover_path FROM books b JOIN books_fts ON books_fts.book_id = b.id WHERE books_fts MATCH ? AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_files WHERE format = ?)) AND (? IS NULL OR b.metadata_status = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_authors WHERE author_id = ?)) AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_series WHERE series_id = ?)) AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_tags WHERE tag_id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?)))) AND (? IS NULL OR b.publisher_id = ?) ORDER BY b.updated_at ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
